steps.title: Match the multiplier
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, the second equation must be the first equation multiplied by the same number. The coefficients of $x$ and $y$ are both multiplied by $4$:
$$3\cdot4=12$$
$$5\cdot4=20$$

steps.title: Scale the constant
steps.content: The constant must also be multiplied by $4$. $$8\cdot4=32$$ So $a=32$. The answer is C.
